_comment: STING corporate Drawing Types. Override per project by dropping a drawing_types.json under <project>/_BIM_COORD/. Project entries win by id; routing rules from the project file are PREPENDED (first-match-wins).

_tokenProfileDesign.rationale: Each drawingType.tokenProfile is precomputed for Phase 165 by the matrix in commit message 'Intelligent tag profile matrix'. Override any field per project by dropping a project-scoped drawing_types.json under <project>/_BIM_COORD/.
rules: PRESENTATION (pres-*) — ITALIC GREY 2.5mm, Mono scheme, depth 2, PROD-SEQ display, identity+spatial sections only. Subdued for client-facing decks.
CLARIFICATION (clar-*) — BOLDITALIC RED 3mm, Discipline scheme, depth 3, full 8-segment, A+B+C+D+F sections. Markup style for RFIs / queries.
HANDOVER / FM (handover, fm-*) — NOM PURPLE 2.5mm, System scheme, depth 10, HANDOVER pattern, T4+T9+T10 tiers active. Lifecycle-ready audit trail.
SPOOL / FABRICATION (-spool, -fabrication) — BOLD BLACK 3mm, System scheme, depth 7, DISC-PROD-SEQ display, T7 fab+QC tier. Workshop-readable.
SCHEDULE (-schedule) — NOM 2mm, BOQ preset, depth 1, no graphic scheme, PROD-SEQ display. Schedules render as tables.
COORDINATION / CLASH (coord-, clash-) — BOLD RED 2.5mm, Discipline scheme, depth 8, T8 clash triage tier. Highlights ownership.
LEGEND — NOM GREY 2mm, Compact preset, depth 1, SEQ-only display. Legend tags read like keys.
FIRE STRATEGY / FIRE ALARM (-fire-) — BOLD RED 2.5mm, System scheme, depth 4, T4 commissioning tier. Witness/sign-off captured.
DEMOLITION — BOLD RED, Status scheme, depth 2. Status colours show NEW/EXISTING/DEMOLISHED.
FINISHES (-finishes, -screed, -raised-floor) — Status scheme, depth 3. Each finish package reads distinctly.
SETTING OUT — BOLD, depth 4, Discipline scheme. Survives crowded annotation.
SITE / ACCESSIBILITY — Zone scheme, depth 3. Reads compliance routes / building zones.
AREA PLAN — Function scheme, depth 2, DISC-PROD-SEQ display. Functional zoning emphasis.
RCP — System scheme, depth 3, A+B+C+E sections. Distinguishes ceiling-fixture systems.
FOUNDATION — BOLD BLACK, Material scheme, depth 4. Concrete/rebar/steel callouts.
PLUMBING DRAINAGE — GREEN, System scheme, depth 3. Discipline convention.
ELECTRICAL POWER / LIGHTING / FIRE ALARM — ORANGE (high contrast vs yellow on white), System scheme. Riser uses Level scheme to track floor distribution.
PARTITION / SANITARY LAYOUT — depth 3, DISC-PROD-SEQ display. 1:50 detail layouts.
DETAIL — NOM 3.5mm, FullSpec preset, depth 5, all 6 A-F sections visible. Most-data-per-element drawings.
SECTION / ELEVATION — NOM, depth 3, full 8-segment, A+B+C sections. Standard production read.
PLANTROOM (1:50 dense MEP) — BOLD BLUE 3mm, System scheme, depth 5. Survives plantroom density.
HVAC DUCT PLAN — System scheme, depth 3. Air-system colour coding.
STANDARD PLAN (arch / struct / mep / elec / plumbing fallthrough) — NOM, Discipline-coloured, Discipline scheme, depth 3, full 8-segment. The default production read.

disciplineColors.E_elec: ORANGE — high contrast on white (yellow unreadable)

stages.RIBA_2_concept: PRESENTATION profiles (pres-*) — depth 2, mono, ITALIC GREY
stages.RIBA_5_construction: DC pattern, depth 7+, BOLD spools, T7 fab tier active
stages.RIBA_6_handover: HANDOVER pattern, depth 10, T4+T9+T10 tiers, PURPLE

clientFacingProfiles: clar-design-intent-A1 — design narrative for client review

drawingTypes.name: Electrical Panel Schedule — A3
_apiCaveats: PanelScheduleSheetInstance.Create has been broken in Revit 2024-2026. STING creates the sheet + applies the title block + stamps the drawing-type id, but the user must drag the PanelScheduleView onto the sheet manually.
The 'PanelSchedule' viewType in the slot is informational; STING tooling does not auto-place panel schedule views into slots.

drawingTypes.name: Setting Out / Dimensioned Plan — A1 @ 1:50
drawingTypes.description: Construction setting-out plan. Ordinate dimensions from origin grid; gridlines and level annotations enabled; mono print.

drawingTypes.name: Internal Partition Layout — A1 @ 1:50
drawingTypes.description: Partition / wall layout with door + window tags. Linear dims; mono print.

drawingTypes.name: Demolition Plan — A1 @ 1:100
drawingTypes.description: Demolition phase plan. Existing-to-remain halftoned; demolished elements red dashed; new work bold.

drawingTypes.name: Sanitary / Wet Room Layout — A1 @ 1:50
drawingTypes.description: Sanitary fixture layout cropped to room boundary. Auto-tags fixtures and rooms; linear dims; mono print.

drawingTypes.name: Raised Access Floor Plan — A1 @ 1:50
drawingTypes.description: Raised access floor (RAF) panel grid layout. Ordinate dimensions from origin; mono print.

drawingTypes.name: Floor Build-Up Detail — A3 @ 1:10
drawingTypes.description: Layered floor build-up detail (screed, separation, insulation, slab). Tight crop; material tags.

drawingTypes.name: GIA / NIA Area Plan — A1 @ 1:200
drawingTypes.description: Gross / net internal area plan with area + room tags. Coarse detail level; presentation print.

drawingTypes.name: Presentation Floor Plan — A1
drawingTypes.description: Client presentation floor plan. Rich material colours, room tags only, no dimensions.

drawingTypes.name: MEP Plan — Presentation (Phase 135)
drawingTypes.description: Client-facing MEP plan. Shallow paragraph depth, only TAG7 sections A+B visible, soft Discipline colour scheme, segment mask hides LVL/ZONE for visual cleanliness.

drawingTypes.name: MEP Plan — Technical (Phase 135)
drawingTypes.description: Engineering-issue MEP plan. Full paragraph tier 5, all TAG7 sections visible, System variable colour scheme, BOLD tags, full 8-segment tag mask.

drawingTypes.name: MEP Plan — Fabrication (Phase 135)
drawingTypes.description: Workshop-floor MEP plan. Tier 10 audit-trail TAG7, all sections, System variable colours, BOLD-RED tags, mask shows DISC-SYS-PROD-SEQ for spool-pack readability.

drawingTypes.name: Presentation 3D Interior Cut-Away
drawingTypes.description: Apply a Section Box manually before generating with this profile. The section box should cut at ceiling height to expose the interior. Pairs naturally with pres-interior-terracotta or pres-interior-sage.

drawingTypes.name: Presentation Composite Sheet
drawingTypes.description: 4-slot composite presentation sheet — main 3D axonometric (60% width) plus stacked floor plan, section, and section/elevation strip down the right. The plan and section slots use 1:200 medium detail; the 3D slot is NTS coarse. Pack defaults to pres-burgund-green.

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Room Data Sheet (A2)
drawingTypes._description: One per clinical room: plan, elev, equipment list, services, finishes, sign-off

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Clinical Equipment Plan (A1 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: FF&E callouts, pendant + bedhead positions, scrub/AED/PTS

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — MEP Coordination + Shielding (A1 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: Combined MEP coordination with radiation-shielding overlay

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Medical Gas Layout (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: MGPS pipe layout per HTM 02-01

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Medical Gas Schematic (A1)
drawingTypes._description: Manifold → riser → ZVB → AAP → terminal-unit schematic

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Pressure Regime Plan (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: Δp arrows, AIIR/PE/anteroom cascade per HTM 03-01

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Essential Power Single-Line (A1)
drawingTypes._description: EES single-line with LS/CR/EQ branches + ATS, NFPA 99 / HTM 06-01

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Isolated Power Plan (A1 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: Isolated power systems for OR / ICU per NEC 517

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Decontamination Flow Plan (A1 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: HSDU dirty / clean / sterile flow per HBN 13

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Mortuary Plan (A2 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: Mortuary / post-mortem suite per HBN 16

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Fire Compartment + PHE Plan (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: HTM 05-02 / BS 9999 compartmentation + PHE refuges

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Radiation Shielding Plan (A1 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: mm Pb callouts on walls/doors/windows per NCRP 147

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — MRI Suite Zoning (A1 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: Z1..Z4 zoning + 5-Gauss boundary

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Anti-Ligature Plan (A1 1:50)
drawingTypes._description: Ligature risk bands + observation LOS per HBN 03-01

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Bedhead Elevations (A2 1:20)
drawingTypes._description: Bedhead trunking elevations with services schedule

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — OR Ceiling RCP (A2 1:20)
drawingTypes._description: Pendant/boom/light/laminar canopy reflected ceiling

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Water Safety Plan (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: TMV3 / aug-care / sentinel / RO-loop per HTM 04-01

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Acoustic Strategy Plan (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: NR rating + Rw bands + private/sensitive zones

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Imaging Equipment Structural Loads (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: MRI / CT / Linac point loads + slab edge stiffening

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — RTLS Coverage Plan (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: RTLS / RFID reader coverage with dead-zone overlay

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Clinical Waste Flow (A1 1:100)
drawingTypes._description: Clinical / cytotoxic / sharps / general flows segregated

drawingTypes.name: Healthcare — Nuclear Medicine Schematic (A1)
drawingTypes._description: Hot lab / dispensing / waiting / imaging zoning
